fields.label: Instruction Title
fields.description: Descriptive title for the usage instruction

fields.label: Instruction Code
fields.description: Unique code for this instruction (auto-generated if empty)

fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Draft
Active
Under Review
Approved
Deprecated
Archived
fields.description: Current status of the instruction

fields.label: Instruction Type
fields.options:
General Use
Agricultural Application
Industrial Application
Domestic Use
Professional Use
Dilution Guide
Mixing Guide
Safety Protocol
Emergency Procedure
Storage Guideline
Other
fields.description: Type of usage instruction

fields.label: Linked Product
fields.description: Primary product this instruction applies to

fields.label: Linked Variant
fields.description: Specific variant this instruction applies to (if applicable)

fields.label: Product Family
fields.description: Product family this instruction applies to

fields.label: Applies to All Variants
fields.description: Whether this instruction applies to all variants of the product

fields.label: Usage Scenario
fields.description: Brief description of the usage scenario (e.g., 'Pre-emergence weed control')

fields.label: Target Application
fields.options:
Crop Protection
Pest Control
Weed Control
Fungicide Treatment
Fertilization
Soil Treatment
Seed Treatment
Post-Harvest Treatment
Cleaning
Disinfection
Surface Treatment
Other
fields.description: Primary target application area

fields.label: Target Pests/Organisms
fields.description: Comma-separated list of target pests, weeds, fungi, etc.

fields.label: Target Crops/Surfaces
fields.description: Comma-separated list of target crops or surfaces

fields.label: Mixing Ratio Description
fields.description: Human-readable description of mixing ratio

fields.label: Product Quantity
fields.description: Amount of product to use

fields.label: Product Quantity UOM
fields.description: Unit of measure for product quantity

fields.label: Diluent Type
fields.options:
Water
Oil
Solvent
Carrier Oil
Water + Surfactant
Other
fields.description: Type of liquid used for dilution

fields.label: Diluent Quantity
fields.description: Amount of water/solvent to mix with

fields.label: Diluent Quantity UOM
fields.description: Unit of measure for diluent

fields.label: Concentration Percentage
fields.description: Final concentration as percentage

fields.label: Minimum Concentration
fields.description: Minimum effective concentration

fields.label: Maximum Concentration
fields.description: Maximum safe concentration

fields.label: Application Rate
fields.description: Amount to apply per unit area

fields.label: Application Rate UOM
fields.description: e.g., L/ha, kg/ha, ml/m2

fields.label: Coverage Area
fields.description: Area covered by prepared mixture

fields.label: Coverage Area UOM
fields.description: e.g., hectare, m2, acre

fields.label: Application Method
fields.options:
Spray
Foliar Spray
Soil Drench
Seed Treatment
Broadcast
Band Application
Drip Irrigation
Fertigation
Injection
Dipping
Brushing
Wiping
Fogging
Other
fields.description: How to apply the prepared mixture

fields.label: Equipment Required
fields.description: List of equipment needed for application

fields.label: Application Timing
fields.description: Best time for application (e.g., 'Early morning', 'Pre-emergence')

fields.label: Min Temperature (C)
fields.description: Minimum application temperature

fields.label: Max Temperature (C)
fields.description: Maximum application temperature

fields.label: Humidity Requirements
fields.description: Humidity conditions for application

fields.label: Wind Conditions
fields.description: e.g., 'Calm to light breeze, max 10 km/h'

fields.label: Weather Restrictions
fields.description: Weather conditions to avoid

fields.label: Application Frequency
fields.description: How often to apply (e.g., 'Every 14 days', 'As needed')

fields.label: Max Applications per Season
fields.description: Maximum number of applications allowed per season

fields.label: Min Interval (Days)
fields.description: Minimum days between applications

fields.label: Pre-Harvest Interval (Days)
fields.description: Days before harvest to stop application

fields.label: Re-Entry Interval (Hours)
fields.description: Hours to wait before re-entering treated area

fields.label: Hazard Level
fields.options:
Low
Moderate
High
Very High
Extreme
fields.description: Overall hazard level for this usage

fields.label: Hazard Symbols
fields.description: GHS hazard pictogram codes (comma-separated, e.g., GHS02, GHS07)

fields.label: Signal Word
fields.description: GHS signal word

fields.label: Primary Hazards
fields.description: Main hazards associated with this usage (comma-separated)

fields.label: PPE Required
fields.description: Personal protective equipment required

fields.label: Safety Warnings
fields.description: Detailed safety warnings and precautions

fields.label: First Aid Instructions
fields.description: First aid measures in case of exposure

fields.label: Usage Restrictions
fields.description: Conditions where use is restricted or prohibited

fields.label: Incompatible Products
fields.description: Products that should NOT be mixed with

fields.label: Do Not Use If
fields.description: Conditions that prohibit use

fields.label: Buffer Zone (Meters)
fields.description: Required buffer zone from water bodies, etc.

fields.label: Environmental Hazards
fields.description: Environmental impact and precautions

fields.label: Disposal Instructions
fields.description: How to dispose of unused mixture and containers

fields.label: Prepared Mixture Shelf Life
fields.description: How long the prepared mixture remains effective

fields.label: Storage Conditions
fields.description: How to store the prepared mixture

fields.label: Agitation Required
fields.description: Whether continuous agitation is needed

fields.label: Use Immediately After Mixing
fields.description: Mixture must be used immediately

fields.label: Registration Number
fields.description: Product registration number for this use

fields.label: Approved Countries
fields.description: Countries where this usage is approved (comma-separated)

fields.label: Regulatory Classification
fields.description: Classification category (e.g., 'Restricted Use Pesticide')

fields.label: Applicator Certification Required
fields.description: Whether certified applicator is required

fields.label: Mixing Instructions
fields.description: Step-by-step instructions for preparing the mixture

fields.label: Application Instructions
fields.description: Step-by-step instructions for applying the mixture

fields.label: Additional Notes
fields.description: Any other important information

fields.label: Valid From
fields.description: When this instruction becomes valid

fields.label: Valid To
fields.description: When this instruction expires

fields.label: Last Review Date
fields.description: When this instruction was last reviewed

fields.label: Next Review Date
fields.description: When this instruction should be reviewed

fields.label: Reviewed By
fields.description: User who last reviewed this instruction

fields.label: Created By
fields.description: User who created this instruction

fields.label: Approved By
fields.description: User who approved this instruction

fields.label: Approval Date
fields.description: When this instruction was approved

fields.label: Version
fields.description: Version number of this instruction

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.description: Notes visible only to internal team

fields.label: Tags
fields.description: Comma-separated tags for categorization and search
